positive: A stylized cosmic nebula animal print pattern, featuring silhouettes of leaping deer, celestial crescent moons, and stylized constellations forming an interwoven tapestry. The style is geometric neo-tribal mixed with ethereal bioluminescence. Use deep indigo blues, sapphire accents, glowing teal, and muted gold for contrast. The composition must be a dense, repeating, seamless pattern optimized for apparel fabric, with strong contrast silhouettes against a slightly gradient background. Minimal detail is key for screen printing; clean lines, high contrast, and negative space utilization are paramount. Studio quality, high detail, clean lines, repeating pattern, seamless tiling.
negative: low quality, artifacts, blurry, text, watermark, logo, signature, cartoon, childish, noisy, bad anatomy, extra limbs, illegible, distracting elements
